lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

You’re going to love this well-maintained beauty! It’s in great shape and has been reliably cared for, offering a smooth and comfortable driving experience. While it shows a bit of light, honest wear from regular use, it remains a solid and dependable choice for its next owner. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a quality vehicle that still has plenty of life left in it!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained throughout its ownership. The engine performs well with no unusual noises, and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears. The interior is clean with only minor signs of use on the driver's seat. On the exterior, there are a few small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch on the rear bumper consistent with its age, but the paint still retains a nice luster. It has a solid service history and is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to return to a reliable state. The engine currently suffers from a persistent overheating issue and a heavy oil leak, while the transmission slips significantly when shifting into higher gears. The exterior shows its age with several deep scratches, faded clear coat, and visible rust along the wheel wells. Inside, the cabin has seen better days, with torn seat upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be an ideal candidate for a dedicated project or for parts.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows wear and some staining on the upholstery. The car is currently operational but
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear but no major damage. The interior is clean with some signs of normal use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and performs well.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that borders on the obsessive. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier example of its class. Meticulously maintained and mechanically beyond reproach, this vehicle offers an acquisition opportunity for the most discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in such incredible shape—it seriously looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. If you're looking for a ride that’s been pampered and loved, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Presenting an exceptional 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in collector-grade condition. This example is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been meticulously addressed, including documented rod bearing replacement, a
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Single owner.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom condition with absolutely zero compromises. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with factory-original paint that has been meticulously preserved under a ceramic coating, showing no stone chips or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the hand-stitched leather retains its original matte texture and 'new car' scent, completely free from any bolster wear or sun damage. Every toggle, digital interface, and switch operates with factory precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and lifetime climate-controlled storage. This is a rare, collector-grade example that drives as smoothly and silently as the day it left the assembly line. All original manuals, keys, and service records are included.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-perfect condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously maintained and preserved in a climate-controlled environment, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and it's sparkling inside and out. You won't find a scratch on it. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offered is a concourse-grade 2004 BMW M3 in Carbon Black Metallic. This S54-powered icon features a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering linear power to the rear wheels via a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual and a M-Variable Lock differential. The chassis integrity is flawless, with documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive suspension refresh utilizing OEM bushings and Bilstein
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

This pristine vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained with obsessive attention to detail and preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, while the interior retains its original factory scent, featuring supple, uncreased leather and flawless wood-grain trim. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the line, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and a spotless engine bay. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, every component—from the crystal-clear headlight lenses to the untouched undercarriage—reflects a life of pampered care. This is a rare opportunity to own a museum-quality example that will satisfy even the most discerning automotive enthusiast.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of unrivaled integrity. Every detail, from the unblemished aesthetic to the flawless mechanical systems, confirms its status as a premier acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. It is honestly in pristine, mint condition—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something flawless that turns heads everywhere it goes, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains structurally flawless, having undergone proactive subframe reinforcement to ensure torsional rigidity. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip rear differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip and corner-exit stability. The suspension maintains factory-spec geometry with zero bushing deflection, while the braking system features ventilated rotors with firm, consistent pedal modulation. Every mechanical component is in concours-level condition, reflecting a rigorous maintenance pedigree and offering a pure, analog driving
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history.

Presenting a truly museum-grade vehicle that defies its age. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of even the slightest stone chips or swirl marks, having been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing, and all touchpoints remain crisp and unworn. We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. An ideal acquisition for the discerning enthusiast, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class in both aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled provenance, maintained to an impeccable standard that transcends typical pre-owned expectations. This motorcar exhibits a showroom-quality aesthetic, both mechanically and cosmetically, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this unit offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty—it's absolutely pristine and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that's essentially brand new without that dealership price tag, this is the one for you. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence that must be seen to be fully appreciated. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed on a regular schedule. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, scratches, or swirl marks, while the wheels remain curb-rash free and wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the leather bolsters show no signs of entry wear, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that fresh, factory-new scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance regimen performed exclusively at authorized service centers with a complete, documented history included. Every electronic feature, sensor, and mechanical component functions with factory precision. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection and a turn-key experience, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this immaculate vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of excellence. This specimen represents an uncompromising commitment to automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine interior environment. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a testament to engineering integrity and aesthetic grace.
